repair_history.diagnosis:
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 65: left and right sides of binary expression '!=' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Data_Sink is an event data port of type Simple_Type, not an integer; comparing to 0 is type-unsafe and invalid in AGREE -> remove the 'Data_Sink != 0' assumption
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 66: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Data_Sink'.: Data_Sink is not visible in the context of the Q.Impl annex because the annex is attached to Q (not Q.Impl) and Data_Sink is a feature of Q, not directly accessible in Q.Impl annex without proper scope -> move the annex block to Q.Impl
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 66: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Q_Spg'.: Q_Spg is a subcomponent of Q.Impl, not visible in the Q component type annex; AGREE cannot resolve subcomponent ports in a component type contract -> remove the 'signal_flow_routing' guarantee since Q_Spg.Data_Sink is not visible in Q's annex
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 66: left side of binary expression '=>' is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'bool': The left-hand side Data_Sink is not a boolean expression; event data ports cannot be used as boolean triggers in AGREE without explicit conditionals -> remove the 'signal_flow_routing' guarantee

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 79: Guarantee statements are allowed only in component types: AGREE guarantees in implementation annex are not permitted -> Move the entire AGREE annex block from Q.Impl to the component type Q
Source_Data_Size (property association) does not point to anything: undefined property reference in annex -> remove undefined property reference 'Source_Data_Size' from annex
Source_Data_Size (property association) does not point to anything: undefined property reference in annex -> remove or correct undefined property reference 'Source_Data_Size' in the AGREE annex
